export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- handoff --auto "context cycle"
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- nudge drain --inject --hook-format codex
export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && gc hook run --timeout 15s --timeout-exit-code 0 -- mail check --inject --hook-format codex
